lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are in perfect working order.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior shows visible scratches and small dents, and the interior has significant wear from regular use. All mechanical systems are currently functional.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This car is in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth ride and reliable performance you can count on. It shows some light, expected wear from regular use, but it remains a solid and dependable choice for your next adventure. A great vehicle that’s ready for its new owner!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant investment to be roadworthy. The engine has a persistent oil leak and a noticeable knock, while the transmission slips during gear changes. The exterior suffers from extensive rust and several body dents, and the interior shows heavy wear with torn upholstery and non-functional electronics. It is being sold as-is for parts or a major restoration project.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It is currently not roadworthy and will require significant mechanical work, as the engine suffers from low compression and the transmission is failing. The exterior shows heavy wear with substantial rust on the frame and body panels, along with multiple deep dents and failing paint. The interior has sustained significant damage, including torn seats and a cracked dashboard. This car is best suited as a project vehicle or for parts and will need to be towed from the lot.

Presented for your consideration is a superlative example of automotive excellence, maintained to an exacting standard. This vehicle remains in mint condition, boasting a flawless aesthetic and a mechanical profile that mirrors its original factory delivery. Every surface, from the hand-detailed interior to the lustrous exterior finish, reflects a pedigree of meticulous preservation. This is an unparalleled opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen of uncompromising quality.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. It is in truly pristine, showroom condition—I've babied this car since the moment I got it! You won't find a single scratch or dent anywhere, and it honestly drives like it just rolled off the lot. I’m only selling because I’m looking to try something new, but I know whoever gets behind the wheel next is going to be over the moon. It’s a total dream, and I’d love for you to come see just how flawless it is for yourself!

Offering a museum-grade E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65 4.0L V8 with its 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. This specimen is mechanically flawless, boasting a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox with zero synchro drag and a perfectly calibrated M-Variable locking differential. Preventative maintenance is comprehensive, including documented rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators. The chassis remains exceptionally taut, with factory-spec bushings and an uncompromised subframe. Finished in Alpine White over Novillo leather, the exterior retains its original factory luster while the interior displays no bolster wear or UV degradation. A collector-tier example for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Clean title. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Full service records included.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive care and preservation, presenting in a state that rivals its original delivery. The exterior is finished in a deep, mirror-like factory paint that remains entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear or creasing, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic component functions with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule and stored in a climate-controlled environment to ensure its longevity. With remarkably low mileage and a chassis that feels as tight and responsive as the day it was built, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a truly museum-grade example that looks, smells, and drives like new.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in absolute showroom condition. This specimen has been curated with fastidious attention to detail, manifesting in a flawless exterior profile and an interior that remains entirely indistinguishable from new. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to verify its mechanical integrity, this car represents an unparalleled opportunity for the most discerning collector. We invite you to experience a vehicle that sets the benchmark for pre-owned excellence.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in an unblemished state, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original showroom delivery. From the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, every detail reflects a commitment to superior care. Mechanical integrity is absolute, ensuring peak performance for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey friends! Honestly, I'm a bit sad to let this one go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy this absolute gem. It’s in total showroom condition—seriously, it’s flawless! It’s been pampered since day one and drives like it’s brand new. You've gotta see it to believe how pristine it is!

This E46 M3 represents a superlative example of the S54 platform, featuring a high-revving 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline. The ZF 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a meticulously maintained variable M differential lock. Mechanically sorted with a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and proactive subframe reinforcement, the chassis remains rigid and responsive. Finished in pristine condition, the suspension geometry retains its factory precision, while the braking system exhibits zero fade under load. A turn-key investment for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full maintenance records available. Runs perfectly.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like luster and absolutely no chips or blemishes. The interior is equally pristine, with the premium leather upholstery showing no signs of wear and the cabin retaining its original factory-fresh scent. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach; it has been maintained with an open-checkbook policy, resulting in a driving experience that is tight, responsive, and indistinguishable from new. Every electronic component and convenience feature functions perfectly. Included with the sale are all original keys, the complete owner's manual set, and a comprehensive folder of service history. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a virtually untouched example of automotive excellence.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, the exterior retains its original showroom luster, while the cabin remains in impeccable, original condition. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision of a new model, offering a driving experience that satisfies the most discerning collector. We invite you to inspect this superlative example of engineering excellence, which stands as a testament to meticulous stewardship.

We are pleased to present this peerless specimen, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with a pristine, factory-fresh interior. Meticulously preserved and mechanically beyond reproach, it represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking uncompromising quality.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty—it's honestly in such incredible shape, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, keeping it pampered and garage-kept, so it's absolutely pristine inside and out. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come check it out, you won't be disappointed!

Offering a superlative E46 M3 in collector-grade condition. The S54 power plant remains in peak form, featuring a high-pressure VANOS system and individual throttle bodies that pull linearly to an 8,000 RPM redline. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a refreshed cooling system, ensuring structural and thermal integrity. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox offers precise gate engagement, while the variable M differential lock provides exceptional mechanical grip. Every bushing and seal is intact, with zero fluid seepage or chassis fatigue. A mechanically flawless, turn-key performance icon.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Clean title. Full service history. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a showroom-standard masterpiece that defines the term 'mint.' This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like luster and zero imperfections. The interior is equally impressive, featuring factory-fresh upholstery, spotless carpets, and a cabin that retains its original scent. Every electronic component and driver-assist feature operates with out-of-the-box precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. With its smooth power delivery and tight, responsive handling, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from a brand-new model. For the discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality, this is the definitive choice.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. From its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior appointments, this automobile offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original factory delivery. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in impeccable showroom condition. This specimen exhibits flawless bodywork, a pristine interior, and a documented history of fastidious mechanical care. It represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber and aesthetic integrity.

Hey everyone! I’m finally parting with my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, you’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor yesterday! It’s been pampered its whole life and is looking for a new home where it’ll be just as loved. It’s seriously flawless—come see for yourself!

This investment-grade example features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, characterized by its 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. Power is delivered via a precise six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring exceptional lateral dynamics. The vehicle boasts a pristine undercarriage with no evidence of fluid seepage or bushing degradation. Preventative maintenance is comprehensive, including treated rod bearings and a verified throttle actuator service. The factory-correct paint retains its deep luster, and the interior remains free of bolster wear or UV damage. A mechanically flawless specimen optimized
2021 model. Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Immaculate interior and exterior. Full service history included.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. The exterior is finished in a deep metallic gloss, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating that ensures a mirror-like finish free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component and luxury feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is indistinguishable from new, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history at authorized centers and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. The wheels are absolutely pristine without a hint of curb rash, and the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly immaculate, collector-grade example that has never seen inclement weather.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an immaculate exterior and a pristine, smoke-free interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising standards for performance and reliability. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of excellence, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to acquire a near-new driving experience.
